heading: Comptroller General audit and examination of books, etc.; statutory provisions applicable; contracts or grants covered
label: 2708 Comptroller General audit and examination of books, etc.; statutory provisions applicable; contracts or grants covered
text: shall apply with respect to the authority of the Comptroller General to have access to and rights of examination of books, documents, papers, and records of recipients of financial assistance under this chapter; except that for the purposes of this chapter, the term “contract” (as used in , insofar as it relates to such ) means “contract or grant”.Section 5876 of title 42section 2206 of title 42section 5876 of title 42
